title: My AI generated this portfolio, will update frequently as it changes.
author: zoetsekas
selftext: No LLM, just data science and deep learning

comments.author: zoetsekas
comments.body:
Gemini generated this commentary about the portfolio. I think it was good!

🚀 Why You Won Today: The Closing Drivers
​The primary reason you stayed green while the Nasdaq fell was your exposure to the "Fear Trade" sectors that spiked mid-afternoon.
​The Energy Surge (OVV, DNN): Brent Crude surged over 5% to settle at $95.50 after President Trump stated a ceasefire extension was "highly unlikely." Your large weights in OVV (+1.32%) and DNN (+0.90%) were the primary engines that protected your bottom line.
​Logistics Strength (FDX, RELX): FedEx (FDX) held its ground, closing near its daily highs at $394.80 (+0.76%). In a market where supply chain routes are being re-drawn daily, your 5.88% weight in FDX acted as a high-quality anchor.
​The Value Pivot (GPN, RELX): These professional and industrial services stocks attracted "refugee capital" fleeing the high-beta tech names in the Nasdaq.

​📉 The Day's Detractors
​Materials (AEM): This was your biggest drag. Gold futures fell 1.2% to $4,820 as a "sell-the-news" event hit precious metals. AEM (-2.30%) neutralized a large portion of your energy gains.
​Utilities (OGE): Your largest holding, OGE (-0.60%), saw some late-day pressure as treasury yields crept higher on renewed inflation fears from the oil spike.
